title: polynomial evolution update
summary:
I worked on Glassbox today to make polynomial recovery better. I added adaptive high-power evolution in the C++ backend. I exposed p_min and p_max in the API so I can control power ranges.

I enabled polynomial-aware p_max expansion in the beam search. I also changed the init and mutation logic to seed exponents from integer candidates. This helps when the target is something simple like x^5. I rebuilt the backend and tested it. It now recovers x^5 exactly in evolution-only mode. The search is much more focused on polynomials now.
commitMessages: feat(sr): add adaptive high-power evolution for polynomial formulas
